display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Vintage Games
programme.desc: From March 23, 1994, when Gretzky breaks the goal scoring record.

programme.title: The Whalers
programme.desc: Almost three decades after leaving Connecticut, the Hartford Whalers remain a fixture in the sports world. This is the story of how the team came to be, why they moved and what makes them a throwback phenomenon.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Ottawa Senators and the Carolina Hurricanes takes place at Lenovo Center. This marks the first playoff meeting between these two franchises. Carolina won the regular-season series 2-1.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes host the Senators in Game 2 of their Eastern Conference first-round series. Carolina looks to build on its 1-0 series lead after Taylor Hall and Logan Stankoven provided the offense in a 2-0 Game 1 win at Lenovo Center.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes meet the Senators for Game 3 of the East first round at Canadian Tire Centre. Carolina leads 2-0 after a 3-2 double-OT win. Ottawa erased a 2-0 deficit to force OT, but Jordan Martinook won it at 13:53 of the second overtime.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes face the Senators in Game 4 of the East first round at Canadian Tire Centre. Carolina leads 3-0 after a Game 3 win. Logan Stankoven opened the scoring for the third straight game. Frederik Andersen made 21 saves in the 2-1 victory.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes host the Senators in Game 2 of their Eastern Conference first-round series. Carolina looks to build on its 1-0 series lead after Taylor Hall and Logan Stankoven provided the offense in a 2-0 Game 1 win at Lenovo Center.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Jaromir Jagr - Oldest player hat trick. From Jan. 3, 2015.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Jaromir Jagr. From May 2, 1999.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Penguins take on the Blackhawks in Game 4 of the 1992 Stanley Cup Finals from June 1, 1992.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Jaromir Jagr - Jagr's 600th goal. From Nov. 19, 2006.

programme.title: Ice Gold: A Journey from Worst to First
programme.desc: The true story of the underdog 2002 U.S. Paralympic Sled Hockey team that, along with their scrappy coach, former NHL star Rick Middleton, went from dead last to Gold Medal champions.

programme.title: NHL Network Countdown
programme.desc: A countdown of the best goalscorers from the '80s.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Mikki Padilla.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Two longtime friends, a group of friends and special guests, "the Property Brothers," ride in the taxi.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity battles include Bellamy Young vs. Weird Al Yankovic and Tony Hale vs. Justin Long.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Brooke Burns and Mark "The Beast" Labbett reunite in a showdown.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Chante, Will, Shannon and Frank.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Sibs Cheryl and Rose take on co-workers John and Cole.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chaser James "The High Roller" Holzhauer battles against a murder mystery enthusiast, a veterinary pathologist, and a Michigan local whose irrational fear includes floating heads.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Church co-pastors and brothers Matt, a firefighter, and Nick, a high school teacher and football coach, take on the wall; with the all-new Superdrop and millions of dollars just a drop away, there is no stopping where these Texas boys will go.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Minneapolis, Shelton, Conn. and Melbourne, Fla.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Besties Dia and Tutrea go up against daughter-dad duo Stephanie and Tim.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Deanna, Andrew, Kierra and Dana Lee.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity battles include Randall Park vs. Anna Camp and Terry Crews vs. Natasha Lyonne.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants try their luck to win cash, from a penny to a million dollars.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Sandra, Brandolyn, Abigail, and Dren.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Brothers Dwellie and Kevin battle Damo and Shanique.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: A trivia battle based on the U.K. series where contestants take part in a fast-paced quiz in an attempt to earn as much money as possible.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Valencia and Essence, a mother-daughter flight attendant duo from Indianapolis, take on the wall, which has them flying high; Valencia goes to isolation to take on the trivia, while Essence is out front directing those balls towards the million.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Live: The Hockey Hub
programme.desc: Hockey talk from NESN announcers that begins with the Bruins and expands to cover the greater New England hockey scene.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.title: Live: Boston's Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox First Pitch
programme.desc: A preview of the upcoming game and news and analysis from industry insiders.

programme.title: Red Sox GameDay Live
programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.desc: Tom Caron and Alex Spier discuss Red Sox topics, including prospects, front office matters and future team expectations.

programme.desc: A review of the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Live UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: Sturm Graz v Hearts (Kick-off 7.30pm). Coverage of the second qualifying round first-leg tie from Merkur Arena.

programme.title: Sporting Countdowns
programme.desc: Focusing on some of the most memorable moments in sports history.

programme.title: NASCAR Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Window World 450.

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross Championship
programme.desc: Action from the Grand Prix of Germany.

programme.title: Swedish Speedway
programme.desc: Indianerna v Dackarna.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: We are in Rome for the second part of our exclusive documentary, learning how Alisson fought to establish himself in the Italian capital and in Jürgen Klopp¿s Liverpool plans.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Cody Gakpo.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Liverpool's Sound
programme.desc: Kop Chants and their Origins - We explore the history of Liverpool's unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Steven Gerrard joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 2005 Champions league Final.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Salah: Farewell to The King
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.title: Cup Kings
programme.desc: Relive the glory of Liverpool's previous six European Cup triumphs with back-to-back highlights of each victorious final.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: Lucas: 10 Years a Red
programme.desc: In the summer of 2017 Lucas Leiva called time on his Liverpool career and moved to Lazio. This documentary looks back on the popular Brazilian's decade at the club.

programme.title: Bobby Doc
programme.desc: From the humble origins of his hometown in Brazil to the height of success with the Reds, this 'LFC Originals¿ documentary maps the life of samba star Roberto Firmino.

programme.title: Coutinho: Home from Home
programme.desc: A revealing portrait of The Magician as Philippe Coutinho invites the LFCTV cameras into his Liverpool home. In an intimate extended interview we find out about the person behind the football genius.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single goal Fernando Torres scored for the Reds.

programme.title: European Royalty: The Joy of Six
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary in which we relive Liverpool's sixth European Cup victory in Madrid - and the subsequent parade which brought the city to a standstill.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In this LFC Originals exclusive, we visit the childhood home of Alisson Becker and discover the story of his first steps towards becoming one of the world¿s finest goalkeepers.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: We are in Rome for the second part of our exclusive documentary, learning how Alisson fought to establish himself in the Italian capital and in Jürgen Klopp¿s Liverpool plans.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Better Than Brazil
programme.desc: An LFC Originals mini-documentary that relives the famous night in April 1988 when Liverpool put five past Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: Salah: Farewell to The King
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.title: Ee-Aye-Addio: 1965 and All That
programme.desc: Relive the glory of Liverpool's first FA Cup win in 1965 through the eyes of those who played a key role in ending 73 years of hurt.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Alexander Arnold.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: Press Box
programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Relive all the goals from Liverpool 2018/19 Champions League campaign.

programme.title: Salah: Farewell to The King
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Press Box
programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Relive all the goals from Liverpool 2017/18 Champions League campaign.

programme.title: Live From The Open
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding The Open focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: Live: 5 Clubs With Gary Williams
programme.desc: Viewpoints of people in the game with people who love the game; we discuss what is of interest to them in the vast and deep reservoir of stories within the game of golf.

programme.title: Live: Golf Channel Podcast With Rex & Lav
programme.desc: GolfChannel.com writers discuss and debate the news of the PGA Tour, DP World Tour, LPGA, Korn Ferry Tour, Champions Tour, College Golf and the amateur game.

programme.title: Live From The Open
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding The Open focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: Live: Golf Today
programme.desc: Damon Hack, Anna Jackson and Eamon Lynch lead and shape the daily conversation throughout the golf world.

programme.title: Golf Today
programme.desc: Damon Hack, Anna Jackson and Eamon Lynch lead and shape the daily conversation throughout the golf world.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: The Open Highlights
programme.desc: Scottie Scheffler shoots a final-round three under 68 to claim his fourth major championship.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: Live: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: Playing Lessons From the Pros
programme.desc: PGA TOUR winner Lanto Griffin tees it up at TPC Sawgrass to share on-course strategies on some iconic holes. Plus, he goes in-depth on his green reading and putting process.

programme.title: 2026 Open Championship
programme.desc: The 154th Open Championship concludes at Royal Birkdale Golf Club as the winner claims the trophy. Final-round pairs complete the 72-hole stroke play tournament, crowning the champion who earns the Claret Jug and a huge share of the purse.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: Live: The Big Swing With Jimmy Roberts
programme.desc: Conversations with people making news in the business of golf.

programme.desc: Viewpoints of people in the game with people who love the game; we discuss what is of interest to them in the vast and deep reservoir of stories within the game of golf.

programme.desc: Conversations with people making news in the business of golf.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.desc: PGA TOUR winner Lanto Griffin tees it up at TPC Sawgrass to share on-course strategies on some iconic holes. Plus, he goes in-depth on his green reading and putting process.

programme.title: Live: Range Remedies
programme.desc: Part 1/2.

programme.title: Live: Range Remedies
programme.desc: Part 2/2.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From Corales Golf Club in Punta Cana, Dominican Republic.

programme.title: Women's College Gymnastics
programme.desc: From Crisler Center in Ann Arbor, Mich.

programme.title: College Field Hockey
programme.desc: From Nov. 10, 2013.

programme.title: Michigan State Basketball Classic
programme.desc: A.J. Granger scores 17 points and Morris Peterson adds 14 to help lead the 5th-ranked Spartans to a 76-61 victory over the 25th-ranked Illini for the Big Ten Championship. From March 12, 2000.

programme.title: Big Ten Elite
programme.desc: Mateen Cleaves returns from injury to guide the Spartans to a National Championship.

programme.title: Live: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: An all-access documentary that follows Tom Izzo and the Michigan State men's basketball team when they travel to the upper peninsula of Michigan to play an exhibition game against Izzo's alma mater -- Northern Michigan University.

programme.title: Michigan State Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Adreian Payne scored 18 points to lead the 22nd-ranked Spartans to their second Big Ten tournament title in three years with a 69-55 win over the 8th-ranked Wolverines. From March 16, 2014.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Michigan State Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: The Spartans came back from an 0-2 deficit, with the help of Akasha Anderson's 26 kills, to secure a five-set victory over the 16th-ranked Trojans. From Oct. 24, 2024.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Michigan State Football Classic
programme.desc: From Dec. 5, 2015.

programme.title: Michigan State Basketball Classic
programme.desc: From March 7, 2005.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: Take a closer look at the Michigan State basketball tradition of kissing the floor at center court on senior night. Hear from coach Tom Izzo, former Spartan players Mateen Cleaves, Shawn Respert, Draymond Green, as they reflect on the tradition.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Michigan State Football Classic
programme.desc: From Dec. 7, 2013.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Join coach Mark Dantonio, Jalen Watts-Jackson, play-by-play Sean McDonough and more as they look back on one of the most memorable plays in college football with Michigan State's last second win over rival Michigan in 2015.

programme.title: Michigan State Football Classic
programme.desc: From Oct. 17, 2015.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Michigan State Hockey Classic
programme.desc: Patrick Geary scored the game-winning goal in overtime to lift the Spartans to a 5-4 victory over the Wolverines to win the Big Ten Tournament title. From March 23, 2024.

programme.title: Michigan State Hockey Classic
programme.desc: Isaac Howard finished with 4 points, including the game-winning goal, to lift the top-ranked Spartans to a 4-3 victory over the 9th-ranked Buckeyes to win the Big Ten title. From March 22, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: College Wrestling
programme.desc: From Jan. 17, 2022.

programme.title: Michigan State Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Drew Neitzel scores 28 points to help lead the Spartans to a 64-55 victory. From Feb. 20, 2007.

programme.title: Michigan State Football Classic
programme.desc: Kenneth Walker III rushes for 197 yards and 5 touchdowns to lead the 8th-ranked Spartans to a 37-33 victory over the 6th-ranked Wolverines. From Oct. 30, 2021.

programme.title: College Field Hockey
programme.desc: From Ann Arbor, Mich.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: Big Ten Semifinal. From May 27, 2017.

programme.title: Northwestern Field Hockey Classic
programme.desc: Ashley Sessa had one goal and two assists in the 2nd-ranked Wildcats' victory over the 9th-ranked Hawkeyes to win the Big Ten title. From Nov. 9, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Comedian, television host and Northwestern graduate, Seth Meyers sits down with Dave Revsine to discuss his impressive career, including Meyers' time as a cast member and head writer for Saturday Night Live.

programme.title: Northwestern Women's Lacrosse Classic
programme.desc: Izzy Scane scored five goals to help top-ranked Northwestern secure the Big Ten title with a 14-12 victory over the 15th-ranked Nittany Lions. From May 4, 2024.

programme.title: Northwestern Women's Lacrosse Classic
programme.desc: Annabel Child scored three goals to help the top-seeded Wildcats defeat the 2nd-seeded Terrapins 8-7 in overtime to win their fourth consecutive Big Ten title. From April 25, 2026.

programme.title: Northwestern Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Boo Buie had 31 points and nine assists to lead the Wildcats to a 92-88 upset victory over the top-ranked Boilermakers in overtime. From Dec. 1, 2023.

programme.title: First Dance
programme.desc: Northwestern basketball's historic run to its first NCAA Tournament, with highlights and interviews.

programme.title: Northwestern Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Derek Pardon's layup with 1.7 seconds remaining seals the game for the Wildcats in a thrilling 67-65 victory over the Wolverines. From March 1, 2017.

programme.title: Northwestern Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 28, 2022.

programme.title: Northwestern Softball Classic
programme.desc: The 18th-ranked Wildcats clinched the Big Ten Tournament title with a 2-1 walk-off win over the Hoosiers. From May 13, 2023.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Zak Kustok, Sam Simmons, offensive coordinator Kevin Wilson and more look back on Northwestern's historic 54-51 win over Michigan in 2000.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: Original content and storytelling that focuses on student-athlete features from a variety of the conference's 27 varsity sports.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Syracuse Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Syracuse Orange.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by North Carolina Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 UNC Tar Heels.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 7 Aggies host the No. 10 Hurricanes in the College Football Playoff's first round. Texas A&M saw its undefeated season, and its chance at the SEC title, spoiled in a Nov. 28 loss at Texas. These programs traded home wins in 2022 and 2023.

programme.title: CFP Quarterfinal at the Goodyear Cotton Bowl Classic
programme.desc: The No. 10 Miami Hurricanes face the No. 2 Ohio State Buckeyes at AT&T Stadium. This is a high-stakes College Football Playoff Quarterfinal matchup. Miami advanced after a gritty 10-3 road upset over No. 7 Texas A&M in the CFP First Round.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 3 Hurricanes visit the No. 18 Seminoles. Miami leads the rivalry series 36-33 after beating Florida State 36-14 in 2024. FSU is coming off a double-overtime loss to Virginia on Sept. 26. Miami last played Sept. 20, beating Florida 26-7.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Golden Bears (5-2, 2-1 ACC) make their first trip to Lane Stadium to face the Hokies (2-5, 1-2). The only previous meeting between the schools came in the 2003 Insight Bowl, when Cal quarterback Aaron Rodgers led his side to a 52-49 shootout win.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cardinals (4-1, 1-1 ACC) try to bounce back against a tough foe in the No. 2 Hurricanes (5-0, 1-0). Louisville dropped its first game of the season in a 30-27 overtime decision versus Virginia on Oct. 4. Miami defeated Louisville 52-45 last year.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Syracuse Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Syracuse Orange.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by North Carolina Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 UNC Tar Heels.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: Original content and storytelling that focuses on student-athlete features from a variety of the conference's 27 varsity sports.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by California Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 California Golden Bears.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Pittsburgh Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Pittsburgh Panthers.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Louisville Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Louisville Cardinals.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 12 Tigers seek a 10th straight win over the Yellow Jackets in this match from Bobby Dodd Stadium. Clemson doubled up Georgia Tech 42-21 behind four TD passes from Cade Klubnik on Nov. 11, 2023. Georgia Tech leads the all-time series 51-36-2.

programme.title: CFP Semifinal at the VRBO Fiesta Bowl
programme.desc: No. 6 Ole Miss faces No. 10 Miami in the Fiesta Bowl at State Farm Stadium for a spot in the College Football Playoff semifinals. The Rebels seek an eighth straight win behind Kewan Lacy (23 TDs), while the Hurricanes lean on QB Carson Beck (27 TDs).

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 3 Hurricanes visit the No. 18 Seminoles. Miami leads the rivalry series 36-33 after beating Florida State 36-14 in 2024. FSU is coming off a double-overtime loss to Virginia on Sept. 26. Miami last played Sept. 20, beating Florida 26-7.
